positive: A central, symmetrical circular medallion design featuring highly stylized crescent moons, cosmic nebulae, and blooming ethereal flora. The artwork should have a symmetrical arrangement, utilizing clean silhouettes and strong linework with subtle gradients. Color palette: deep indigo, luminous pearl white, metallic gold accents, and soft pastel sage. Style: Neo-vintage celestial tapestry meets modern minimalist botanical illustration. Composition: Perfect radial symmetry, designed to be centered on fabric. Lighting: Flat, high-contrast vector rendering suitable for screen printing, no harsh shadows. Print-friendly, repeating seamless pattern elements suggested in the negative space.
negative: blur, lowres, jpeg artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, noise, clutter, dirty, grayscale, solid block of color
